geometry.objectDefinition: one uncertain object per cleaned road line/segment MBR
geometry.zeroAreaMbrPolicy: expand degenerate MBR axis by 1 metre
geometry.segmentPolicyPendingDecision: use line features directly or split long OSM ways before MBR creation

uncertainty.probability: equal per instance and normalized per object

distribution.assignment: random object-level assignment to N server partitions
distribution.indexRequired: one spatial summary/index per server partition

status.curation: pending geometry conversion and instance generation
status.paperReproductionClaim: not permitted until curation, spatial indexing, and validation are complete
